entries.name: 画师风格串-NAI
entries.content:
<画师风格固定规则>
每次生成<imagine>标签时，必须在图片提示词最前面原样附加以下画师串，不得修改、省略或重排，画师串与后续提示词之间用逗号分隔：
[[[misaka_12003-gou]]], {{{{artist:murata_yuusuke}}}}, [[[[[[[[artist:drive shot]]]]]]]], [[[[[artist:nishiii26miii]]]]], 0.2: mgong520 ::, [[[[[[[artist:kome_cola]]]]]]], [[[artist:hito komoru]]],year 2024, 0.8:: realistic, 8K ::, 1.2:: dynamic angle ::, 1.3::very aesthetic,absurdres, highres, highly finished,amazing quality, masterpiece, best quality::, -1.7::simple illustration::, best anatomy, fine lines, -2::upscaled, blurry::,, very aesthetic, masterpiece, no text
</画师风格固定规则>
